title: Global Vectors (GloVe)
content:
# GloVe Mechanics

## 1. Objective Function
$$J = \sum_{i,j=1}^V f(X_{ij}) (\mathbf{w}_i^{\top} \tilde{\mathbf{w}}_j + b_i + \tilde{b}_j - \ln X_{ij})^2$$

## 2. Weighting Function
$$f(x) = (x / x_{\max})^\alpha \quad (\text{for } x < x_{\max})$$
*   Ensures that rare co-occurrences are not weighted heavily, and frequent co-occurrences do not dominate gradients.
